kids-month.title: Kids Month: Dine In and Receive a Cute Toy
paragraphs: This June brings surprises for kids! Children dining in at participating stores can receive a cute toy with their meal.
kids-month.note: While supplies last. One toy per child, per visit.

rice-noodle-festival-2026.title: 2026 Rice Noodle Festival | 2nd Bowl 50% Off
paragraphs: The annual Yunshang Rice Noodle Festival is back! From May 25 to May 31, 2026, VIP members who dine in and order any two rice noodle bowls in the same transaction will receive 50% off the lower-priced bowl.
Not a VIP member yet? Register in store for $20 + tax and enjoy this offer plus ongoing member savings.
compactLines: Available at all Yunshang locations in Canada

ninth-anniversary.title: Yunshang 9th Anniversary
paragraphs: Nine amazing years, same delicious promise — and we are celebrating big! From August 30 to September 1, 2025, enjoy 9 of our most-loved noodle bowls for just $9.99 each.
compactLines: Pick up a $90 coupon booklet with qualifying purchases

member-week-noodle-festival.title: Member Week | Yunshang Rice Noodle Festival
paragraphs: Yunshang's first Rice Noodle Festival is here with a full week of rewards.
Enjoy VIP member benefits including a second bowl at 50% off, plus scratch cards with prizes for qualifying dine-in orders of $40 or more.
June 23 to 29, 2025 at participating Yunshang locations across Canada.
member-week-noodle-festival.note: Join us for a week of great food, fun, and festival deals.

pork-tripe-trial.title: New Dish Tasting Event
paragraphs: Our new fall-winter limited edition Chicken & Pork Tripe Rice Noodle Soup with Peppercorn is now available.
Redeem your New Dish Coupon and complete a survey to enjoy a complimentary tasting from November 15 to December 15, 2024.
compactLines: Present your New Dish Coupon before ordering.
One coupon per table per visit.
Complete the tasting survey to qualify.
Cannot be combined with member discounts or other offers.

family-day.title: Free Coconut Lava Ball for Kids
paragraphs: Happy Family Day long weekend! From February 17 to 19, 2024, children under 12 years old will receive a complimentary Coconut Lava Ball dessert with dine-in orders.
One complimentary dessert per table. Available at participating Ontario locations while supplies last.

christmas-2023.title: 2023 Holiday Celebration
paragraphs: Promotion runs from December 23, 2023 to January 1, 2024.
Valid for dine-in and pickup orders. Not valid on third-party delivery platforms.
Available at all Yunshang Rice Noodle and Yang's Braised Chicken locations in Canada.
Coupon books include $10 vouchers redeemable on orders of $35 before tax from January 2 to February 29, 2024.

seventh-anniversary.title: Yunshang 7th Anniversary: Pay What You Wish
paragraphs: On August 19, 2023 from 11:00 AM to 8:00 PM, all Ontario Yunshang locations will host a pay-what-you-wish charity event benefiting SickKids.
VIP members can also receive a complimentary $85 member coupon booklet with qualifying purchases during the anniversary period.
